displayNameZh: 实验结论三点总结动画
summary: Yt Experiment Conclusion component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「实验结论三点总结动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-experiment-conclusion/src/YtExperimentConclusion.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtExperimentConclusion` and `ytExperimentConclusionDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Experiment Conclusion Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-experiment-conclusion to my project. Preserve the exported YtExperimentConclusionProps API and register the YtExperimentConclusion composition with the default props.
